pageDescription: Browse real backend challenges: CRUD APIs, JWT auth, rate limiters, caching, WebSockets and more. Submit your Spring Boot project and get scored by real HTTP tests.

sidebar.newChallengesEmailDesc: — email me when a new challenge is published in the catalog.
sidebar.verifyEmailNote: Verify your email to enable this option.

serviceHint: Make sure challenge-service is running at http://localhost:8082

detail.pageDescription: Read the briefing and start a timed run: submit your Spring Boot API and get scored by real HTTP tests.
detail.dailyBannerCopy: You cannot start a new run until the daily counter resets (UTC).
detail.cooldownBannerCopy: You cannot start a new run until the cooldown ends. Full requirements are available only from the submit screen after you can start.
detail.specsTeaser: Endpoints, HTTP contracts, automated test suite, performance and design criteria, hints, and learning objectives are only revealed inside the challenge once you start and open the submit workspace. Sign in, then use
detail.specsTeaserAfter: when you are ready to see everything you need to build and ship your ZIP.
detail.specsFoot: Think of this page as the briefing — the arena opens when you enter the timed run.
